---
name: Misc feedback
about: Share any of your thoughts on character-sheet
title: Feedback
labels: ''
assignees: sam-holmes2

---

Thanks for taking the time. Honest feedback -- positive or negative -- is the most useful thing you can give an early-stage project. Fill in as much or as little as you like.

**What's working well for you?**
Anything you've found genuinely useful, satisfying, or that surprised you in a good way.


**What's frustrating, confusing, or missing?**
No filter needed. If something feels off, is hard to understand, or you keep wishing it did something different -- this is the place.


**How are you using it?**
How often, which tabs you actually use, whether you're using it with an AI or offline -- whatever gives context. No right answer.


**Overall, how's it landing?**


**Anything else?**
Feature ideas, philosophical objections, comparisons to other tools, or anything that didn't fit above.
